content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(authMiddleware)
C: backcompat ∧ security ∧ minimal_diff
H: boundary_expiry
P: if(expMs<nowMs-30000) → returnres.status(401)
V: it('shouldnotreturn401forboundaryexpiry',asyncfunctiondone)
R: ! potentialwrongfullyacceptedtokens
A: addgraceperiodforboundaryexpiry

[AUDIT]
Audit for security implications completed.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: decide(modular_monolith)
C: team_size:6 ∧ devops:part_time ∧ timeline:4_months ∧ data_store:postgresql
H: simple_management ∧ easy_deployment ∧ reduced_overhead ⇒ prefer(modular_monolith)
P: develop_monolithic_structure → modularize_codebase → focus_on_initial_release
R: ! potential_scalability_issues ∧ ! tight_integration_makes_changes_harder ∧ ! future_restructuring_costs
A: the_modular_monolith_is_ideal_for_addressing_current_needs ∧ it_allows_for_initial_focus_on_rapid_delivery

[AUDIT]
Decision supports the team’s capacity and timeline.

structured_data.audit: Decision supports the team’s capacity and timeline.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ attacker_sets_x-user-id_header
P: strip_untrusted_header
V: test_with_valid_session ∧ test_with_malformed_x-user-id_header ∧ test_with_no_x-user-id_header
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! identity_theft
A: prefer(session.userId)

[AUDIT]
Review x-user-id handling for potential exposure.

structured_data.audit: Review x-user-id handling for potential exposure.

content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: minimal_behavior_change ∧ same_validation_order ∧ single_next_err_path
P: promisify(db.findUser) → promisify(audit.log) → promisify(cache.set)
V: user_should_be_found ∧ error_should_be_logged_correctly ∧ cache_should_set_user
R: ! missing_id_error_handling ∧ ! not_found_error_handling ∧ ! audit_logging_failure ∧ ! cache_failure
A: Refactored_code_to_use_async/await_while_preserving_behavior

[AUDIT]
Ensure errors are appropriately handled in a single path.

structured_data.audit: Ensure errors are appropriately handled in a single path.
